profile.name: Daniel Shaw
profile.bio: A third-year Artificial Intelligence student and semi-retired RCer (Robocon), currently working as a robotics software intern at GigaAI. Focused on developing robot control systems.

experience.desc: Focused on robot control systems development, participating in core algorithms testing and implementation.

awards.title: National College Student Robot Competition (Robocon)
awards.desc: Participated as a key member for Chassis control and Delta parallel arm development in the Volleyball Challenge.

projects.title: NCU_RC_2024_Volleyball
projects.desc: Project for NCU Robocon 2024 Volleyball Challenge robot, including chassis control and Delta parallel arm control.
projects.detailsBody:
Coordinates omnidirectional movement, vision tracking, and cushion ball task execution under a real-time control architecture.

  • Omnidirectional chassis kinematics
  • Delta parallel mechanism control
  • Vision tracking & task scheduling

Visit GitHub Repository.

projects.title: Xizhu Bot
projects.desc: QQ Bot based on the Nonebot framework for the Nanchang University Poetry Association (OC Xizhu).
projects.detailsBody:
A functional bot that includes poem search, question bank games, and automatic welcoming systems to improve management efficiency.

Visit GitHub for documentation.
